Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system to Trooper Gerard B. Kane
Summary: Dedicates the bridge over the Southern State Parkway on Udall Road in the town of Islip, county of Suffolk, to Trooper Gerard B. Kane.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law, in relation to dedicating a portion of the state highway system to Trooper Gerard B. Kane
